title: Action Bars, Titles & Tab Lists
description: Learn how to send messages to players using action bars, titles, and customize the player tab list.

lessons.title: Action Bar Messages
lessons.content:
# 💬 Action Bars (FULL BREAKDOWN)

## 📍 WHERE DOES THIS CODE GO?
You can use action bars in:
- Commands (e.g. /buff)
- Events (e.g. when player takes damage)
- Ability systems (VERY common)

👉 BEST PRACTICE: Use in events or abilities for real-time feedback.

---

## 🧠 WHAT IS AN ACTION BAR?
An action bar is a **temporary message** that appears:
👉 Above the hotbar (bottom of screen)

Used for:
- Cooldowns
- Status effects
- Notifications

---

## ✅ FULL CODE
```java
player.sendActionBar(Component.text("§aYou received a buff!"));
```

---

## 🔍 LINE-BY-LINE EXPLANATION

### 1️⃣ player
- This is the Player object
- Represents who receives the message

---

### 2️⃣ sendActionBar(...)
```java
player.sendActionBar(...);
```

- Sends a message to the action bar
- ONLY that player sees it

---

### 3️⃣ Component.text()
```java
Component.text("§aYou received a buff!")
```

- This is from the **Adventure API**
- Used instead of old String messages

#### Why not just use String?
Because Components allow:
- Colors
- Formatting
- Advanced text

---

### 4️⃣ "§a"
- This is a **color code**
- §a = green

---

## ⚠️ IMPORTANT BEHAVIOUR

Action bars:
- Last ~2–5 seconds
- Get overwritten by new ones

👉 If you send multiple quickly → flickering

---

## ❌ COMMON MISTAKES

❌ Spamming every tick (20 times/sec)
❌ Using null player
❌ Forgetting Component.text()

---

## 🧪 TESTING

1. Join server
2. Trigger your command/event
3. Look above hotbar

If nothing shows:
- Check player is valid
- Check code runs

---

## 🧠 DEV THINKING

"Action bar = quick info, not permanent message"

Use it for:
- Live updates
- Short feedback

quiz.question: Where does an action bar appear?

lessons.title: Titles and Subtitles
lessons.content:
# 🏆 Titles & Subtitles (FULL BREAKDOWN)

## 📍 WHERE DOES THIS GO?
Best used in:
- PlayerJoinEvent
- Boss fights
- Level ups
- Important alerts

👉 NOT for spam — these are BIG messages.

---

## 🧠 WHAT ARE TITLES?
Titles are:
- Big text in center of screen
- Optional subtitle below

---

## ✅ FULL CODE
```java
player.showTitle(Title.title(
    Component.text("§6Welcome!"),
    Component.text("§eEnjoy your adventure"),
    Title.Times.of(Duration.ofSeconds(1), Duration.ofSeconds(3), Duration.ofSeconds(1))
));
```

---

## 🔍 BREAKDOWN

### 1️⃣ player.showTitle(...)
- Sends title to player

---

### 2️⃣ Title.title(...)
This builds the title object

```java
Title.title(main, subtitle, times)
```

---

### 3️⃣ Main Title
```java
Component.text("§6Welcome!")
```

- Big bold text

---

### 4️⃣ Subtitle
```java
Component.text("§eEnjoy your adventure")
```

- Smaller text under main

---

### 5️⃣ Timing
```java
Title.Times.of(fadeIn, stay, fadeOut)
```

Example:
- fadeIn = 1 second
- stay = 3 seconds
- fadeOut = 1 second

---

## ⚠️ IMPORTANT RULES

- Titles OVERRIDE previous titles
- Too many = annoying

---

## ❌ COMMON MISTAKES

❌ Using long sentences
❌ Spamming titles
❌ Forgetting timing (defaults feel weird)

---

## 🧪 TESTING

1. Join server or trigger event
2. Watch screen center

---

## 🧠 DEV THINKING

"Titles = IMPORTANT moments"

Use for:
- Boss spawn
- Game start
- Victory

lessons.title: Customizing Player Tab List
lessons.content:
# 📋 Tab List (FULL BREAKDOWN)

## 📍 WHERE DOES THIS GO?
Usually in:
- PlayerJoinEvent (set when player joins)
- Scheduler (for live updates)

---

## 🧠 WHAT IS TAB LIST?
When you press TAB:
- You see players
- You can add header/footer

---

## ✅ FULL CODE
```java
player.sendPlayerListHeaderAndFooter(
    Component.text("§6Welcome to the Server"),
    Component.text("§eHave fun!")
);
```

---

## 🔍 BREAKDOWN

### Method
```java
sendPlayerListHeaderAndFooter(header, footer)
```

- header = top text
- footer = bottom text

---

### Components
Same as before:
```java
Component.text(...)
```

---

## 🎨 MULTILINE TIP

You can do:
```java
Component.text("Line1\nLine2")
```

---

## ⚠️ PERFORMANCE WARNING

Updating too often =
- Packet spam
- Flickering

👉 Update every few seconds MAX

---

## ❌ COMMON MISTAKES

❌ Updating every tick
❌ Long text (looks bad)
❌ Not setting on join

---

## 🧪 TESTING

1. Join server
2. Press TAB
3. Look at header/footer

---

## 🧠 DEV THINKING

"Tab list = server info panel"

Use for:
- Server name
- Player stats
- Events
